banner.text: Professional CV — 100% free, no signup required.

home.seo_title: Create a Free CV Online | Professional Templates
home.seo_desc: Create your professional CV online for free. Choose from our premium CV templates, export in High Quality PDF, and land more interviews.
home.subtitle: Stand out with professional and modern templates. Get a 100% ATS Score with our live gauge and export to High Quality PDF for free.
home.why_title: Why choose Mon CV Go to create a free CV online?
home.why_p1: Job searching is a crucial step in any professional's life. Whether you are a fresh graduate looking for your first job, or an experienced manager wishing to give a new boost to your career, your Curriculum Vitae (CV) is your passport to the interview. Mon CV Go was designed and developed to offer you the best free online CV creation experience.
home.news_title: New: Integrated AI Generation & ATS Score
home.news_p1: To give you an unfair advantage over other candidates, Mon CV Go now integrates two cutting-edge features:
home.news_ai_desc: Lacking inspiration? Click the "AI Magic" button and let our artificial intelligence write a punchy profile summary or perfectly phrased experience descriptions with action verbs for you.
home.news_ats_desc: Instantly discover the effectiveness of your CV! Our gauge calculates your score in real time and gives you precise recommendations (add skills, lengthen the description, etc.) to ensure you pass the filters of recruitment software (Applicant Tracking Systems).
home.ats_title: The importance of a modern and ATS-optimized CV template
home.ats_p1: Today, the majority of large companies and recruitment agencies use application tracking software, called ATS (Applicant Tracking Systems). These programs automatically scan your document for specific keywords even before a human recruiter lays eyes on it. Our CV templates have been designed not only to be aesthetically perfect, but above all to be readable and understandable by these algorithms.
home.pillars_title: Our 3 pillars for a successful CV:
home.pillar_1_desc: A respected information hierarchy with professional fonts that guide the recruiter's eye towards your key skills.
home.pillar_2_desc: Well-defined sections (Profile, Experiences, Education, Skills) that you can easily customize and order.
home.pillar_3_desc: Unlike Word format, PDF export ensures that your layout will remain exactly the same, regardless of the computer or smartphone used by the recruiter.
home.more_title: More than just an online CV generator
home.more_p1: We know that a CV alone is sometimes not enough. That's why Mon CV Go also includes a Cover Letter creation module and an innovative tool to generate a Visual Portfolio. For web, design, architecture, or communication professions, being able to show concrete achievements in one click is an undeniable advantage.
home.more_p2: All your data remains private and secure. Your document is generated directly in your web browser, which ensures that your personal information is not stored unsecurely on third-party servers. This is Mon CV Go's commitment: to provide you with a free, fast service that respects your privacy.
home.steps_title: How to create a professional CV in 3 simple steps?
home.step_1_desc: Explore our gallery of professional designs and select the one that matches your industry.
home.step_2_desc: Add your experiences, degrees, and skills via our simple interface. Watch the preview update in real time.
home.step_3_desc: One click is enough to get your final document in High Definition PDF, ready to be sent to recruiters.
home.portfolio_title: The advantage of an online Portfolio
home.portfolio_p1: More and more recruiters are looking for visual proof of your skills. A classic CV is essential, but a Portfolio makes the difference. Our exclusive tool allows you to transform your projects into an elegant presentation site in PDF format. It is the secret weapon of designers, developers, architects, and marketing professionals to concretely illustrate their added value.
home.link_tips: Discover all our expert tips for writing a perfect CV →

about.seo_desc: Discover the story of Mon CV Go, the free and privacy-friendly CV generator.
about.p1: We believe that every talent deserves to be highlighted without having to pay exorbitant subscriptions. Mon CV Go was designed to democratize access to professional application tools.
about.feat_1_desc: No hidden subscription, no watermark. You generate, you download. It's that simple.
about.feat_2_desc: Your data stays in your browser. Nothing is sent to our servers. You are the sole master of your information.
about.feat_3_desc: Built with the latest web technologies (React, Tailwind) to offer you a smooth, fast and bug-free experience.
about.feat_4_desc: No waiting time. Your document is generated live with every change you make.
about.story_p1: Mon CV Go was born from a simple observation: it is difficult to find a CV creation tool that is at the same time totally free, respectful of privacy, and offering a truly premium rendering. This open-source project aims to fill this void by offering a high quality standard, accessible to all.

contact.seo_desc: Contact the Mon CV Go team for any questions, suggestions or support requests.
contact.p1: A question? A bug to report? An idea for improvement? Feel free to write to us. The Mon CV Go team is here to help you land your dream job.
contact.ph_subject: I have a suggestion for the template...

create_cv.seo_title: Free Online CV Maker: Templates and PDF Export
create_cv.seo_desc: Use our free online CV generator. Fill in your information, choose a design template and download your Curriculum Vitae as a PDF instantly.
create_cv.title: CV Editor
create_cv.subtitle: Fill in the information and watch your CV take shape live.
create_cv.private_desc: Your data remains exclusively in this browser.
create_cv.private_warn: Note, if you clear your cache, you will lose your current CV. Remember to export it regularly!

cover_letter.seo_desc: Write a compelling cover letter easily. Our free generator with AI assistant helps you apply effectively.

personal.title: Personal Information
personal.photo_desc: Recommended format: JPG, PNG, or GIF. Max size: 2MB.
personal.name: Full Name

education.description_ph: Ex: Graduated with honors, AI capstone project...

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.description_ph: Ex: Web app development with React, database management...

summary.title: Profile Summary
summary.description: Write a short paragraph (3-4 lines) to introduce yourself, highlight your strengths, and state your professional goal.
summary.placeholder: Ex: Passionate developer with 5 years of experience building web applications. Specializing in React and Node.js, I'm seeking a Lead Developer role...
summary.generate_ai_desc: Let our AI write a professional profile based on your information.

projects.title: Projects (Optional)
projects.name: Project Name
projects.description_ph: Ex: Developed a full e-commerce platform with online payment...
